name: CiviCRM REST API v4
description: CiviCRM APIv4 provides a standardized REST interface for accessing and managing CiviCRM data entities such as Contacts, Activities, Events, Contributions, Memberships, and more. The API uses entity-action patterns where you specify the entity and action in the URL path. Authentication is via API key or session-based authentication.
